summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShramSetu AI-powered labor marketplace MVP. All core features working including authentication, dashboards, job posting/application, AI match scoring, and theme toggle.
passed_tests: API status endpoint (/api/) returns ShramSetu status
Worker login with demo credentials (ramesh@demo.com/demo123)
Employer login with demo credentials (abc@contractor.com/demo123)
Worker registration with role=worker
Employer registration with role=employer
Worker dashboard loads with jobs, applications, profile tabs
Employer dashboard loads with jobs, applicants, profile tabs
Theme toggle works (dark/light) on both dashboards
Jobs listing shows available jobs
Job search and category filtering works
Employer can post new jobs
Worker can apply to jobs
AI match score appears when applying (84% match score displayed)
Job detail modal shows comprehensive match analysis
Worker applications tab shows applied jobs
Employer can view applicants for jobs
Shortlist functionality works for employers
Logout functionality works for both roles
Navigation between auth page and dashboards works
All backend API endpoints working (16/16 tests passed)
Database seeded with demo users and jobs
JWT authentication working properly
Role-based access control working
